projectDescription: CLI tool for direct Chrome DevTools Protocol access via terminal, designed for AI agents and developers.
keyFeatures: Direct Chrome DevTools Protocol (CDP) access to all 644 protocol methods
DOM inspection with CSS selectors and accessibility tree queries
Network monitoring with HAR export and request filtering
Console message tracking with full argument inspection
Token-efficient design optimized for AI agents
Semantic exit codes for programmatic error handling
Progressive disclosure with simple commands and deep capabilities
Persistent daemon architecture for fast command execution
Unix-friendly with JSON output and pipe support
publicApiSurface: bdg <url> - Start session with URL
bdg status - Check session status
bdg stop - End session
bdg cleanup - Clean up stale processes
bdg peek - Preview collected data
bdg tail - Continuous monitoring
bdg details - Get full request/console details
bdg dom query <selector> - Find DOM elements
bdg dom get <index> - Get element details
bdg dom eval <expression> - Evaluate JavaScript
bdg dom click <selector> - Click elements
bdg dom fill <selector> <value> - Fill form fields
bdg dom scroll <selector> - Scroll to elements
bdg dom screenshot - Capture page screenshots
bdg dom a11y tree - View accessibility tree
bdg dom a11y query - Query accessibility nodes
bdg network list - List network requests
bdg network har - Export HAR file
bdg network getCookies - List cookies
bdg network headers <requestId> - Show request headers
bdg cdp <Domain.method> - Execute any CDP method
bdg cdp --list - List CDP domains
bdg cdp <Domain> --list - List domain methods
bdg cdp <Domain.method> --describe - Show method schema
bdg console - View console messages
